title: Stream-backed collaborative editor with PubSub
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/doc_editor_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.DocEditorLive). It subscribes (on connected?) to "doc:#{doc_id}" and streams :changes. handle_event("edit", %{"ops" => ops}, socket) creates a local change, stream_inserts it, and broadcasts it on the topic. handle_info({:change, change}, socket) checks if change.author_id != socket.assigns.current_user.id (avoid echo) and stream_inserts. mount takes %{"doc_id" => doc_id, "user_id" => user_id} from session. Must use a scoped topic.
tier_rationale: Multi-piece combo: scoped topic + stream + broadcast + echo-suppression.
